current_phase.label: Host boundary and autonomous development process foundation

current_milestone.label: Create standalone platform repo and codify anti-drift workflow gates

progress_summary: Standalone platform repository has been created to prevent platform-core work from drifting into managed business projects. Existing Chinese design docs, capability matrix, recovery redesign, and PC/mobile visual drafts are copied into this repo. The first code-level gate validates host-boundary routing before implementation. Current-session platform materials have been migrated into this repo: formal contracts and visuals are active docs, while stock_dashboard autonomous-flow trials/code/tests and root hook route fixes are quarantined under docs/migrations and legacy for platform-neutral refactoring. Project onboarding/config sync is now tracked as a P0 gate so future projects cannot be created without workspace index, canonical docs, root docs, and route checks.
next_step: Turn migrated legacy autonomous-flow materials into platform-neutral Context Pack, task DAG, artifact ledger, and reviewer/recovery modules; run each step through host-boundary and project-onboarding gates before dispatching subagents.
